name: io.github.waylit/helpscout-mcp
title: Help Scout MCP Server
description: Search Help Scout conversations, customers, organizations, threads, and inboxes with AI assistants

environmentVariables.name: HELPSCOUT_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Help Scout OAuth2 App ID (also accepts HELPSCOUT_CLIENT_ID)

environmentVariables.name: HELPSCOUT_APP_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Help Scout OAuth2 App Secret (also accepts HELPSCOUT_CLIENT_SECRET)

environmentVariables.name: REDACT_MESSAGE_CONTENT
environmentVariables.description: Hide message bodies in responses for compliance (true/false)
